business.name: Knauf Landscape Architecture
business.tagline: Inspired design solutions for Vermont landscapes

hero.headline: Where *art meets earth* in the Green Mountains
hero.subheadline: Memorial gardens, sculpture spaces, rain gardens — each design inspired by your vision and Vermont's natural beauty.

services_section.label: DESIGN SOLUTIONS
services_section.heading: Every landscape tells a story
services_section.subheading: From intimate memorial gardens to expansive resort planning

services.title: Landscape Design & Planning
services.description: Custom landscape design services tailored to Vermont's unique climate and terrain, creating beautiful outdoor spaces that complement your property.

services.title: Hardscape Installation
services.description: Professional installation of patios, walkways, retaining walls, and stone features using quality materials suited for Burlington's seasonal changes.

services.title: Plant Installation & Gardens
services.description: Expert selection and installation of native Vermont plants, trees, and shrubs that thrive in our local growing conditions.

services.title: Lawn Care & Maintenance
services.description: Comprehensive lawn care services including seeding, fertilization, and ongoing maintenance to keep your landscape looking its best year-round.

services.title: Irrigation Systems
services.description: Design and installation of efficient irrigation systems to ensure your landscape stays healthy and vibrant throughout Vermont's growing season.

about.heading: Cynthia Knauf, Landscape Architect
about.body: A Burlington landscape architect bringing inspired design solutions to Vermont properties. Every project reflects careful attention to color, proportion, and natural flow.

reviews.name: Penny M.
reviews.text: Exceptionally creative landscape architect. Her design solutions are inspired; her sense of color, proportion, and flow create beautiful spaces.

reviews.name: Leslie F.
reviews.text: Working with Cynthia transformed my 27-year sculpture garden project. What a difference her formal design expertise made.

reviews.name: Carolyn B.
reviews.text: Incredible landscape architect. She reorganized my three tiny gardens into rain gardens, cutting gardens, and butterfly spaces using all local plants.

cta.heading: Ready to transform your landscape?
cta.body: Let's discuss your vision and explore design solutions that bring out the natural beauty of your Vermont property.
